description.prompt.message: Describe the music style and theme you want

description.vocalGender.message: Select the gender of the generated vocals (only supported in v4.5 and above)

description.styleInfluence.message: Higher values increase the influence of style tags on the generated result (0-100)

In this quiet night
Stars twinkle in the sky

[Chorus]
Let's sing together
Until dawn...
